advancements.veganism.root.title: Veganism
advancements.veganism.root.description: A new way of life. The animals are watching.
advancements.veganism.first_kill.title: First Blood
advancements.veganism.first_kill.descrip: Kill your first animal. They won't forget.
advancements.veganism.summon_spirit.desc: Kill enough animals to summon their avenging Spirit.
advancements.veganism.cursed.title: Cursed
advancements.veganism.cursed.description: Get struck by the Spirit and catch Veganism. Meat is off the menu.
advancements.veganism.defeat_spirit.desc: Defeat the Spirit of the Animals.
advancements.veganism.clean_conscience.d: Go long enough without eating meat to earn the animals' blessing.
